response:
## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Login Form With Complete Accessibility (CLEAN) **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification & Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access, Keyboard & Motor, Screen Reader & Semantic --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 0 | | MAJOR | 1 | | MINOR | 1 | | ENHANCEMENT | 1 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None — the Cognitive & Neurodivergent perspective requires detailed review. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Content Author** - **Password error message lacks specific corrective suggestions** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MINOR — WCAG 3.3.3 - **Help links location consistency unverified across pages** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MINOR — WCAG 3.2.6 **UX Design** - **Error summary links to fields but does not ensure field is in viewport** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — ENHANCEMENT — WCAG 2.4.5 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Confirm help links ("Forgot password?" and "Create account") appear in same relative position across all pages (3.2.6) - Verify error summary links scroll to fields even when fields are not initially visible (2.4.5) --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR finding present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Password error message lacks specific corrective suggestions **WCAG:** 3.3.3 Error Suggestion **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Error message "Password must be at least 8 characters." does not suggest specific ways to strengthen the password (e.g., "Include a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols"). **Fix:** Add password strength suggestions to error message text. ``` ``` **Finding:** Help links location consistency unverified across pages **WCAG:** 3.2.6 Consistent Help **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** Help links ("Forgot password?" and "Create account") are positioned at bottom of form but implementation cannot be verified across other pages. **Fix:** Ensure help links appear in same relative position on every page. ``` ``` **Finding:** Error summary links to fields but does not ensure field is in viewport **WCAG:** 2.4.5 Multiple Ways **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** ENHANCEMENT **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** Error summary links use `href="#fieldId"` but do not include scroll-to-view behavior. **Fix:** Add `scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })` to anchor links in error summary. ``` --- ## Compliance Summary for Cognitive & Neurodivergent Perspective **Passing Criteria:** - ✅ Error messages identify specific issues (3.3.1) - ✅ Error messages associated with fields via `aria-describedby` (3.3.1) - ✅ No CAPTCHA or cognitive function tests (3.3.8) - ✅ Password field allows paste (3.3.8) - ✅ No redundant data entry in single-step form (3.3.7) - ✅ Error summary with `role="alert"` for screen reader announcement (2.4.13) - ✅ Clear heading hierarchy (h1 for page, h2 for error summary) (2.4.6) - ✅ All links underlined for visual clarity (1.4.1) - ✅ Predictable layout with no unexpected layout shifts **Opportunities for Improvement:** - 🔄 Add password strength suggestions to error message - 🔄 Ensure help links appear in consistent location across all pages - 🔄 Add scroll-to-view behavior for error summary links --- ## Severity Rationale **MAJOR (1 finding):** None in this case — all issues are MINOR or ENHANCEMENT. **MINOR (2 findings):** - Password error message could be more helpful but is still functional - Help link consistency is a minor degradation but doesn't block access **ENHANCEMENT (1 finding):** - Scroll-to-view behavior for error links is a AAA criterion (2.4.12) and not required for AA compliance --- ## ARRM Role Recommendations | Role | Action | |---|---| | **Content Author** | Refine password error message to include specific suggestions for stronger passwords | | **UX Design** | Ensure help links appear in consistent location across all pages | | **Front-End Dev** | Add scroll-to-view behavior to error summary links for better navigation | --- ## Code-Level Evidence **Error message implementation:** ```jsx {errors.password && (

{errors.password}

)} ``` **Help links positioning:** ```jsx

Forgot password? {' | '} Create account

``` **Error summary links:** ```jsx {msg} ``` --- ## Next Steps 1. **Content Author** should update password error message to include strength suggestions (e.g., "Try including a mix of uppercase letters, numbers, and symbols"). 2. **UX Design** should verify help link positioning consistency across all pages. 3. **Front-End Dev** should add scroll-to-view behavior to error summary links. 4. Re-run this perspective audit after changes to confirm resolution.
